---
title: "Lectures"
---

### Lectures

[Lecture_1](Lecture_Folder/Week1.html)

[Lecture_2](Lecture_Folder/Week2.html)

[Lecture_3](Lecture_Folder/Week3.html)

[Lecture_4](Lecture_Folder/Week4.html)

[Lecture_5](Lecture_Folder/Week5.html)

[Lecture_6](Lecture_Folder/Week6.html)

[Lecture_7](Lecture_Folder/Week7.html)

[Lecture_8](Lecture_Folder/Week8.html)

[Lecture_9](Lecture_Folder/Week9.html)

[Lecture_10](Lecture_Folder/Week10.html)



### Appendix Lectures (Pre-requisite Computational Tools)

[Appendix A - Computer Systems & Computing Fundamentals](Lecture_Folder/Appendix_A.html)

[Appendix B - Unix & the Command Line](Lecture_Folder/Appendix_B.html)

[Appendix C - GREP, Regular Expressions & Shell Scripting](Lecture_Folder/Appendix_C.html)

[Appendix D - R Programming Fundamentals](Lecture_Folder/Appendix_D.html)

[Appendix E - Git, GitHub & Version Control](Lecture_Folder/Appendix_E.html)

[Appendix F - High-Performance Computing with Talapas](Lecture_Folder/Appendix_F.html)


### Quarto Templates for Class Notes

[Quarto_Template](Lecture_Folder/Week1_BioE_Stats_Analysis_Template.qmd)

[Quarto_Template_in_Text](Lecture_Folder/Week1_BioE_Stats_Analysis_Template.txt)


### Datasets for in Class Exercises

#### Week 2

- [Stickleback RNAseq Data](Lecture_Folder/data/Stickle_RNAseq.tsv)
- [Knee Injury Data](Lecture_Folder/data/knee_injury.csv)

#### Week 5

- [Grip Strength Data](Lecture_Folder/data/grip_strength_data.csv)
- [Cell Culture Expression Data](Lecture_Folder/data/cell_culture_expression.csv)

#### Week 6

- [Zebrafish Development Data](Lecture_Folder/data/Drerio_development.csv)
- [Zebrafish Development Complete Data](Lecture_Folder/data/Drerio_development_complete.csv)

#### Week 7

- [Hydrogel Drug Release](Lecture_Folder/data/hydrogel_drug_release.csv)
- [Nanofiber Tensile Strength](Lecture_Folder/data/nanofiber_tensile_strength.csv)
- [Cell Proliferation Assay](Lecture_Folder/data/cell_proliferation_assay.csv)
- [Implant Degradation](Lecture_Folder/data/implant_degradation.csv)
- [Stickleback Lipid RNAseq](Lecture_Folder/data/RNAseq_lipid.tsv)

#### Week 8

- [Mouse GLP-1](Lecture_Folder/data/glp1_simple.csv)
- [Mouse GLP-1 with Diet Differences](Lecture_Folder/data/glp1_diet.csv)
- [Scaffold Degradation Data](Lecture_Folder/data/scaffold_degradation_data.csv)

#### Week 9

- [Scaffold Porosity Data](Lecture_Folder/data/scaffold_porosity.csv)
- [Scaffold Cell Growth Data](Lecture_Folder/data/scaffold_cell_growth.csv)
- [Implant Failure Data](Lecture_Folder/data/implant_failure.csv)
- [Biomaterial Screening Data](Lecture_Folder/data/biomaterial_screening.csv)
- [Nanoparticle Delivery Data](Lecture_Folder/data/nanoparticle_delivery.csv)

#### Week10

- [Mouse Inflammation Expression](Lecture_Folder/data/mouse_inflammation_expression.csv)

#### Supplemental

- [Biomaterial Properties Data](Lecture_Folder/data/biomaterial_properties_hd.csv)
